titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 2713
GA 2713
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Illegible text tag at beginning of 18.3 removed by David Parker
τουτου at 6.62 made two words by David Parker
First hand text at 21.21 reconstructed by David Parker
First hand text at 21.2-3 reconstructed by David Parker
Verse break at 7.21-2 changed by David Parker
Superline and text in brackets removed from ιω(αννης) and nom sac tag added at 1.26 by Rachel Kevern
μακαρ[3]οι changed to μακαρ[ιοι] οι at 20.29 by Rachel Kevern
Word break at 11.11 changed by Rachel Kevern
Turned επι στραφωσι into one word in 12.40 by Rachel Kevern
Correction at 13.16 emended by David Parker.
Lots of word breaks, especially around app tags, corrected by Catherine Smith following data provided by Rachel Kevern.
Word breaks in 8.34, 12.25, 16.1, 18.12, 13, 37, 20.30, 21.1 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Catherine Smith.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-Α 2713 L1 transcription F 288 β - 362 αΤranscribed by: ΑSWUpdated to Level 1: 06.04.09Last modified: 18.01.101st transcription made from microfilm in Μuenster.3rd transcription made made by checking printout of 1st against the microfilm.L1 transcription made by checking printed transcription against printed images.Checked in family 1 collation, especially singular reading and disagreements with 118-209: 27.04.09 Τhroughout the ms there are a number of short gaps (a few letter spaces) in the text, sometimes with signs of smudging.Τhe gap tag has been used at these point.Short sections of damaged text towards the end of the ms has been filled in by a late hand.Folio numbering is not visible on the micofilm. Τhe folios have been numbered according to information in the library catalogue.Ηands: Τwo hands are recognised in this manuscript, the original scribe who made around 8corrections, (C*) and a much later hand, (C1), that filled in some lost text at theend of the ms and made a few corrections in the rest of the manuscript.Adjustment of tags and removal of entities for ECM conversion: HAGH 27.3.2013The {[S] tags have been changed into {[C1] tags, because there were no C1 tags as mentioned above.

ab.note: right bottom margin torn: letters from 305α showing
left bottom margin torn: letters showing from 303 β
the scribe probably began writing χρoνoν but then decided to erase it
line ending, possibility of v. small amount of further text hidden by margin

ab.w:
μνη
Text has not been written on the left side of this page from line 6 to the bottom of the page, perhaps because of poor parchment quality.
μειου
ab.note: from line 6 to the bottom text has not been copied in the left part of the page, perhaps because of poor parchment qualilty, the gaps vary from 4 to 8 letter spaces
perhaps not quite enough space for four letters
